Headline: #22 Clark Temporary Reroute at Clark/Lawrence
ShortDescription: 22 Clark buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions, due to police activity near Clark/Lawrence.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#22 Clark buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Clark, Foster, Ashland, Lawrence, Clark, and over normal route, due to police activity near Clark/Lawrence.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #66 Chicago Temporary Reroute near North Water/Cityfront Plaza
ShortDescription: 66 Chicago buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to, street blockage near North Water/Cityfront Plaza.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#66 Chicago buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to, street blockage near North Water/Cityfront Plaza.

Westbound buses will operate via Washington, Michigan, Ohio, Fairbanks, and over normal route.

Eastbound buses will operate via Chicago, Fairbanks, Ontario, Michigan, and over normal route.

Allow extra travel time.
